Query.tables: AEA PR P CPR GA C

LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT AEA.AE_NUMBER AS "AEA.AE_NUMBER" , AEA.CASE_NUMBER AS "AEA.CASE_NUMBER" , C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE" , AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "AEA.PA_PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION AS "PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION" , AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "AEA.PA_CASE_PARTY_NO" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "AE.EVENT_DATE" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , AEA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "AEA_ORA_ROWSCN" , C.ORA_ROWSCN AS "C_ORA_ROWSCN" , PR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PR_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AEA , CASES C , PARTY_ROLES PR , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA , PARTIES P , CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR WHERE C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE = ${param.owningCourtCode} AND AEA.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.ADDRESS_ID IN ( SELECT GA2.ADDRESS_ID FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA2 WHERE (GA2.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND GA2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA2.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA2.VALID_TO IS NULL AND GA2.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SERVICE' ) OR (GA2.CASE_NUMBER IS NULL AND GA2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE IS NULL AND GA2.CASE_PARTY_NO IS NULL AND GA2.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND GA2.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' ) )

LinkedJoin.Join: E.AE_NUMBER = AEA.AE_NUMBER AND E.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND E.STD_EVENT_ID IN (888, 889, 890, 900)
